title: Run venture product discovery
goal: Convert a product idea into a bounded feature brief with explicit decision gate and quality check.

steps.text: Define problem statement, target user, and desired outcome.
Draft feature brief using template sections and explicit in/out scope.
Capture risks, unknowns, dependencies, and proposed decision gate.
Apply venture product quality gate and record result (`pass`, `pass-with-notes`, `fail`).
Pause for AJ review before promoting brief to delivery planning.

acceptanceCriteria: Feature brief includes all required template sections
No implementation work is proposed without review

verification.text: Confirm brief includes problem statement, scope boundaries, acceptance criteria, and decision gate
Confirm quality gate classification is present and justified
